behavior_summary: When the player uses the U8P_AORTA::look/examine action on the AORTA object/entity, the script emits a single short description line: "Zealan ceremonial shield ".
The U8P_AORTA::look handler is a process-type function that displays the bark and then immediately suspends/ends; there is no branching, menu interaction, or state mutation.
No global flags, parameters, locals, or external calls are used by this script; behavior is self-contained and purely descriptive.
notable_control_flow: U8P_AORTA::look runs as a process (U8P_AORTA::look/examine handler), executes a single Bark node, and then issues a suspend/terminate — i.e., one-step linear flow.
There are no conditional branches, menu prompts, or follow-up processes triggered by this function.
open_questions: The bark text contains a trailing space ("Zealan ceremonial shield "); is this intentional (e.g., concatenated elsewhere) or a minor text artifact?
Is AORTA an inventory item, static world object, or NPC-mounted item? The script only provides a descriptive line and does not disambiguate the entity type.
Are there other processes (use/activate) associated with this entity elsewhere in data that would change behavior beyond this U8P_AORTA::look handler?

main_function.name: U8P_AORTA::look
main_function.purpose: Provide the short examination description shown to the player when they 'U8P_AORTA::look' at the AORTA entity.
entry_conditions: Invoked by the engine when the player performs the U8P_AORTA::look/examine action on the AORTA object (inferred from process type 0x0208 and function classification 'U8P_AORTA::look').
